creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to Rainer Hurling from comment #15)
"... variant (b) seems the safest to me."

I generally agree, although it may not be that simple.

But variant (a) isn't bad just to get numpy2 into the tree for now - for people to start using / investigating migration of existing code that uses numpy (along with the nice migration guide mentioned in comment 4).  This assumes we don't get a rush to update dependencies to point to numpy2 and quickly start hitting dependency hell.
